positive: A minimalist and highly detailed stylized illustration of a cheerful woodland creature silhouette, like a wise raccoon or fox, sitting amongst stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The style should be high-contrast modern graphic design, reminiscent of enamel pins and vintage scientific illustration, with clean, solid color areas and strong black outlines. The color palette should be deep forest greens, midnight blues, earthy browns, and pops of glowing neon teal and yellow from the mushrooms. Centrally composed, suitable for repeating pattern prints on apparel. Vector art quality, intricate line work, clean separation of colors, flat graphic shading, perfect symmetry, no gradients beyond flat color shifts.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifact, text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry background, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realistic, gradient, messy, clutter
